title: Documents - Text Editing
description: Document creation, editing, formatting, and professional writing skills

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a word processor?
options: To create and edit text documents
questions.explanation: A word processor like Microsoft Word is designed for creating, editing, and formatting text documents.

questions.question: Which formatting option makes text appear slanted?
questions.explanation: Italic formatting slants text to the right, commonly used for emphasis or technical terms.

questions.question: Using consistent styles throughout a document improves its professional appearance and makes editing easier.
questions.explanation: Styles ensure consistency in formatting and allow for quick modifications across the entire document.

questions.question: What does the 'Page Break' function do?
options: Starts a new page while continuing the document
questions.explanation: Page Break inserts a manual break to start content on a new page without leaving blank space.

questions.question: The spell checker catches all grammatical errors automatically.
questions.explanation: While spell checkers catch misspellings, they don't catch all grammar issues and require manual review.

questions.question: How often should you save your work while editing a document?
questions.explanation: Saving frequently prevents loss of work in case of technical issues or unexpected shutdowns.

questions.question: What is the best use for headers and footers in a professional document?
options: To include document title, page numbers, date, and author information
questions.explanation: Headers and footers are used for consistent information across all pages like page numbers and document titles.

questions.question: Why might you use a table in a document?
options: To organize data in rows and columns clearly
questions.explanation: Tables help organize complex information in an easy-to-read format with clear rows and columns.

questions.question: The Find & Replace function can be used to automatically update multiple instances of text at once.
questions.explanation: Find & Replace is a powerful feature for making bulk text changes throughout a document efficiently.

questions.question: What is the advantage of using document templates?
options: They provide consistent formatting and save time on frequently created documents
questions.explanation: Templates ensure consistency and reduce the time needed to create documents with standard formats.
